label: Transparent parrot motif source
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Parrot transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a scarlet macaw parrot, isolated full subject, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A scarlet macaw with accurate parrot anatomy, scarlet red body feathers, cobalt blue wings, emerald green feather transitions, sun-yellow wing bands, warm cream beak, pale facial patch, deep feather-ink shadows, crisp talons, and natural layered feather detail.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; show the full bird and tail feathers without cropping.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves saturated feather color, realistic texture, and crisp silhouette edges.
Chroma-key background: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Transparent-output workflow: copy the generated chroma source to .source/motif-chroma.png, then remove only the #ff00ff background with a hard key using remove_chroma_key.py, auto-key border sampling, tolerance 48, and despill. Do not use soft matte for this red motif because it makes scarlet feather pixels partially transparent.
Constraints: no maple leaves, no grapevine, no raspberry or strawberry plant, no text, no watermark, no props, no jungle background, no second bird, no perch, no cage.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Parrot" derived from the visible transparent scarlet macaw cutout.
Reference use: This light design-system board is the source reference for coding the theme. Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from the scarlet red body, cobalt blue wings, emerald green transitions, sun-yellow bands, warm beak cream, canopy green support tones, and deep feather-ink shadows in the visible parrot cutout.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board.
Required visible sections: Morphous Parrot, Scarlet Macaw, Palette, Typography, Multilingual Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Typography: include English and multilingual examples; use labels like Geist, Noto Sans, Heading, Body, Label, Numeric. Show product UI guidance for dense dashboards.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line/bar charts, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, realistic UI mockup, precise grid, 8px card radius, clean cream surfaces, layered feather-bar dividers, subtle canopy texture, vivid but disciplined tropical hierarchy.
Color palette: use only motif-derived colors plus near-neutrals from the motif: scarlet red, cobalt blue, emerald green, sun yellow, warm beak cream, canopy green, deep feather ink, and soft feather neutrals.
Text: use short readable UI labels; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple gradients, no stock UI kit look, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Parrot" or "Scarlet Macaw".

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a dark-mode version of the visible Morphous Parrot design-system board. It must feel like the same system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: This dark design-system board is the source reference for coding the theme together with the light board. Use the visible transparent scarlet macaw cutout and the visible light-mode Morphous Parrot board as references. Preserve the feather palette roles, component language, feather-bar dividers, canopy texture, spacing, typography, and shadcn/tweakcn component coverage.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board.
Required visible sections: Morphous Parrot, Scarlet Macaw, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Multilingual Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Visual details: dark background derived from deep feather ink and shadow plume, readable text from warm beak cream, primary accents from scarlet red, navigation and charts from cobalt blue, status from emerald green, focus and warning from sun yellow, subtle tropical canopy overlays, crisp shadcn-style cards and controls.
Typography: include English and multilingual examples; labels like Geist, Noto Sans, Heading, Body, Label, Numeric.
Text: use short readable UI labels; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no neon colors, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple gradients, no flat pure-black-only background, no illegible text, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Parrot" or "Scarlet Macaw".
